name: Guest waiting longer than SLA
description: Average wait time exceeds the configured SLA.

recommendation_template.action: Deploy second host or open additional waiting area
recommendation_template.impact: Reduces queue time and prevents guest abandonment

name: Queue exceeds threshold
description: The number of waiting guests exceeds the comfortable queue limit.

recommendation_template.action: Prioritize seating next guests and update wait time estimates
recommendation_template.impact: Improves guest expectations and clears the entryway

name: Host idle while guests are waiting
description: A queue exists but staff utilization is abnormally low.

recommendation_template.action: Reassign idle host to front desk to process waiting guests
recommendation_template.impact: Directly reduces queue length without adding staff

name: Host overloaded
description: Host utilization is near maximum while guests are waiting.

recommendation_template.action: Deploy second host or have manager assist front desk
recommendation_template.impact: Relieves host bottleneck and speeds up seating

name: Restaurant occupancy exceeds configured percentage
description: The total number of active guests is approaching maximum capacity.

recommendation_template.action: Prepare kitchen for peak volume and halt new walk-ins if necessary
recommendation_template.impact: Prevents kitchen overload and maintains service quality

name: Low system confidence
description: Overall tracking and state confidence has dropped below acceptable limits.

recommendation_template.action: Verify camera feeds and check for occlusions or lighting issues
recommendation_template.impact: Restores system reliability and metric accuracy

name: High diagnostic event rate
description: Too many system errors (e.g. illegal transitions) are occurring.

recommendation_template.action: Review system diagnostic logs for pipeline misconfigurations
recommendation_template.impact: Prevents corrupted business state from propagating
